summary: Iteration 96 - Testing Deep AI Analytics (Profit Analysis, Customer Churn, Revenue Prediction), Documents page responsive columns, Stock Reorder AI card, and Sales Forecast AI card. Backend: 7/7 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.

issues: Console warning: span inside tbody hydration error - non-blocking issue caused by React iteration pattern

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new AI deep analytics endpoints correctly implemented with proper response structures
Profit Analysis: Returns insight + items array with name, revenue, qty, profit, margin + total_revenue
Customer Churn: Returns insight + summary counts + at_risk_customers array + total_customers
Revenue Prediction: Returns insight + 12-week history with week, revenue, count
Documents page has proper responsive columns: Type hidden on mobile (sm:), Number/Related To hidden on tablet (md:), File hidden until desktop (lg:)
Stock Reorder page has AI Stock Analysis card with Generate button - working correctly
Sales Forecast page has AI Sales Analysis card with Generate button - working correctly
Dashboard AI Insights widget still working with all 3 buttons (Business Health, Stock Alerts, Sales Trends)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly, AI features working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 96 verified: 1) GET /api/ai-insights/profit-analysis returns AI insight with items array (name, revenue, qty, profit, margin) and total_revenue, 2) GET /api/ai-insights/customer-churn returns AI insight with summary counts (active, cooling, at_risk, churned) and at_risk_customers array, 3) GET /api/ai-insights/revenue-prediction returns AI insight with 12-week history data, 4) Analytics page /analytics has Predictive Hub with 3 new tabs: AI Profit (data-testid=ai-deep-profit-tab), AI Churn (data-testid=ai-deep-churn-tab), AI Revenue (data-testid=ai-deep-revenue-tab), 5) Documents page table has responsive columns (Type hidden on mobile, Number/Related To hidden on tablet, File hidden until desktop), 6) Stock Reorder page /stock-reorder has AI Stock Analysis card with Generate button, 7) Sales Forecast page /sales-forecast has AI Sales Analysis card with Generate button, 8) Dashboard AI Insights widget still works with Business Health/Stock Alerts/Sales Trends buttons. AI endpoints take 5-10 seconds to respond due to LLM call.
